title: lotus krylovii
intro: Lotus krylovii, also known as the Chinese lotus, is a type of aquatic plant belonging to the Nelumbo genus, native to East Asia. It is known for its medicinal properties, particularly in traditional Chinese medicine, where it is valued for its anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antioxidant properties. The health benefits of Lotus krylovii include its ability to lower blood pressure, improve digestion, and reduce stress, as well as its potential to treat various ailments such as fever, skin conditions, and respiratory issues. Lotus krylovii is often used in herbal preparations such as teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be consumed to reap its medicinal benefits.
